block_03: We are glad to inform you that you have been selected to join the new Refer-a-Friend Program. By participating in this program, you can get a $10 reward for each referral you bring to the IQ Option trading platform.
block_06: From 1 to 30 September, share your unique referral link with your surroundings via messengers, social media accounts, etc.
block_07: In case that a person gets registered by using your referral link and fulfills the terms of the Program, both you and them get $10 to the trading balance.
block_08: The money will be credited to the trading accounts once a week on Mondays.
block_10: To get rewarded, your referral must meet the following conditions:
block_11: Be a new customer of the IQ Option trading platform (existing users won’t count)
block_12: Deposit no less than $10 to the real balance
block_13: Make no less than 5 trades on the real account
block_14: Please note that you get rewarded only in case one gets registered on IQ Option via your referral link.
